zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏多上行结构
zh.content:
短线价格运行于6.94支撑上方，并持续逼近7.00整数关口，整体结构震荡偏多，买盘略占优势，短期仍有上探动能但需关注回调风险

MACD维持轻微正值，动能柱扩张有限，显示多头延续但力度不强；均线站上20日线形成支撑短期震荡向上为主但需放量确认信号

下方支撑位关注6.94与6.88区域，上方阻力集中在7.00与7.05，突破7美元后或打开空间需观察量能配合情况变化点

操作上建议以回调低吸为主，若站稳7.00可轻仓顺势跟进，跌破6.94需警惕短线回撤风险控制仓位与风险严格执行纪律为主。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD trading near 6.99, slightly positive 0.43% intraday, hovering near session high 6.9971. Price structure shows mild bullish bias after stabilizing above SMA20 at 6.87924. Short-term momentum appears consolidative with upward tilt, suggesting accumulation phase rather than strong breakout. Market behavior indicates buyers defending dips, but upside follow-through remains cautious as price approaches psychological 7.00 resistance zone in the near term.

Momentum indicators suggest early bullish continuation signals, with MACD reading at 0.0168 above neutral line, implying mild upward momentum despite limited strength. Absence of RSI data reduces precision in overbought/oversold assessment, but price holding above SMA20 reinforces short-term trend support. However, divergence is not yet confirmed, and signal line data is missing, limiting full oscillator confirmation. Overall momentum favors cautious upside bias rather than strong trend acceleration.

Immediate support is found at the SMA20 level around 6.87924, which aligns closely with recent intraday low near 6.9389, forming a short-term support band. A break below this zone could expose deeper retracement toward 6.80 area. On the upside, resistance is concentrated at the psychological 7.00 level, with extended resistance near 7.05 and 7.10, where profit-taking may emerge and limit breakout attempts.

Trading strategy favors a range-to-breakout approach. Traders may consider accumulation on dips toward the SMA20 support zone, with tight risk management below 6.87 to avoid breakdown exposure. For bullish continuation, a confirmed breakout above 7.00 with sustained volume could trigger momentum entries targeting 7.05–7.10. Conversely, rejection at resistance suggests short-term mean reversion opportunities back toward mid-6.90s support levels in the near term.
